key.name: show-in-quick-settings
key.summary: Show EasySpeak in the Quick Settings menu
key.description: When on, EasySpeak appears as a Quick Settings toggle instead of the panel tray icon. The toggle is on while EasySpeak is listening and off while it is asleep, and expands to a Help and an EasySpeak Settings entry. When off, the struck-through microphone tray icon shows instead while EasySpeak is asleep.
